Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Seattle's Best Carpentry to get the job done right.

“We hired Seattle's Best Carpentry to build a new deck in our backyard, and we couldn't be happier with the results! The team was professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is outstanding. They helped us design a deck that perfectly fits our needs and our backyard. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Custom Deck
Mar 15, 2025

“Seattle's Best Carpentry remodeled our kitchen, and the transformation is amazing. They were very helpful in the design process and patient with our many questions. There were a couple of minor delays, but they communicated well and made sure everything was completed to our satisfaction. We love our new kitchen!”

David K. Kitchen Remodel
Apr 22, 2025

“I needed custom cabinets built for my home office, and Seattle's Best Carpentry did an excellent job. The cabinets are beautiful, functional, and exactly what I wanted. The team was professional, courteous, and paid attention to every detail. I would definitely hire them again.”

Emily L. Custom Cabinets
May 10, 2025

“We had some structural issues in our basement, and Seattle's Best Carpentry was able to diagnose and repair the problem quickly and efficiently. They were very knowledgeable and explained everything clearly. We feel much safer knowing that our home is structurally sound.”

Michael B. Structural Repair
Jun 1, 2025

“Seattle's Best Carpentry installed new windows in our home, and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills. The installation process was smooth and professional, and the team was very respectful of our property. We're very happy with the results!”

Jennifer P. Window Installation
Jul 18, 2025

“The siding on my house was damaged after a storm. Seattle's Best Carpentry came out and repaired it promptly and professionally. They matched the existing siding perfectly, and you can't even tell there was any damage. I was very impressed with their service!”

Robert S. Siding Repair
Aug 5, 2025
Seattle's Best Carpentry

Trusted carpenter professionals serving Seattle, WA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
